title: 10 best herbal tinctures for pink eye
description: Maidenhair tree tinctures helps with pink eye because it possesses potent anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The tannins present in the tincture help to reduce swelling and ease discomfort, while its antimicrobial compounds combat bacterial and fungal infections that often cause pink eye.
